summary: Completed testing of CSV Export and Enhanced Billing features. All 20 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified - Settings page has all 4 export buttons and billing link, Billing page shows trial status, trial end date, pricing plans with subscribe buttons.
passed_tests: GET /api/export/minutes - returns CSV with proper headers
GET /api/export/distributions - returns CSV with proper headers
GET /api/export/compensation - returns CSV with proper headers
GET /api/export/tasks - returns CSV with proper headers
Export with trust_id filter works correctly
GET /api/subscription - returns subscription details with new fields (current_period_end, cancel_at_period_end)
Trial user has trial_start_date, trial_end_date, days_remaining
frontend_tests_passed: Settings page - Export Minutes button visible
Settings page - Export Distributions button visible
Settings page - Export Compensation button visible
Settings page - Export Tasks button visible
Settings page - Billing link (Manage Subscription) visible
Billing page - Subscription status card visible
Billing page - Trial status badge with days left displayed
Billing page - Trial end date clearly shown (Your free trial ends on March 8, 2026)
Billing page - Monthly plan card visible ($79/month)
Billing page - Annual plan card visible ($790/year)
Billing page - 2 MONTHS FREE badge on Annual plan
Billing page - Subscribe to Monthly button visible
Billing page - Subscribe to Annual button visible
Billing page - Back to Settings button visible
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Export and Subscription Management features fully tested. Export endpoints return valid CSV files with proper headers. Subscription endpoints properly return 400 errors for trial users without Stripe subscription (as documented). Stripe integration requires active subscription for cancel/reactivate/upgrade/portal operations - this is expected behavior. UI shows trial status clearly with days remaining and end date.

csv_export.GET /api/export/minutes: Returns CSV with columns: Trust Name, Minutes Type, Meeting Date, Participants, Decisions, Created At
csv_export.GET /api/export/distributions: Returns CSV with columns: Trust Name, Beneficiary, Amount, Date, Purpose, Authority Clause, Notes, Solvency Confirmed, Approved By, Approved At
csv_export.GET /api/export/compensation: Returns CSV with columns: Trust Name, Amount, Date, Classification, Exceeds Plan
csv_export.GET /api/export/tasks: Returns CSV with columns: Trust Name, Task Type, Due Date, Description, Status, Completed At

subscription_management.GET /api/subscription: Returns subscription with current_period_end and cancel_at_period_end fields
subscription_management.POST /api/subscription/create-portal: Creates Stripe billing portal (requires active subscription)
subscription_management.POST /api/subscription/cancel: Cancels at period end (requires Stripe subscription)

billing_ui.trial_status: Shows TRIAL - X DAYS LEFT badge
billing_ui.pricing_plans: Shows Monthly ($79) and Annual ($790) with 2 MONTHS FREE badge

settings_ui.export_buttons: All 4 export buttons (Minutes, Distributions, Compensation, Tasks) visible
settings_ui.billing_link: Manage Subscription button navigates to billing page
